name: evidence_diversity_v1
description: Challenger v2 policy: mechanism-aligned evidence ranking. Single-surface change from champion: evidence_ranking_weights boosted for mechanism_overlap (0.20->0.35, +75%) and reduced for api_relevance (0.35->0.20, -43%). Generation prompt, scoring weights, and all other surfaces unchanged from phase5_champion. Hypothesis: mechanism-aligned evidence selection leads to more specific, grounded candidates without suppressing novelty, addressing the synthesis_focus_v1 failure (which suppressed novelty via prompt changes).

metadata.hypothesis: Mechanism-aligned evidence surfacing provides better mechanistic grounding without novelty suppression, improving reviewer plausibility assessments
metadata.rollback_trigger: champion_score_mean regression > 0.05 vs Phase 9C daily baseline OR approval_rate < 50% in A/B trial
